name: Chicken in Tarragon Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Skinless, boneless chicken - breast or chicken tenders
3 large Green onions, sliced, including some of the green tops
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions: Heat oil in a 10-inch heavy skillet. Add chicken and sauté until no longer pink. Remove from pan and keep warm. Add mushrooms and green onions to pan drippings. Sauté briefly, then add white wine, tarragon, and thyme. Cook 2 minutes or until mushrooms are slightly softened and wine has nearly evaporated from the pan. Add lemon juice, half and half, and heavy cream. Bring just to a boil; return chicken and accumulated juices to the pan. Heat thoroughly. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Serve immediately over rice or noodles. Serves 4.
